question: I've had a cough for six weeks that won't go away. My primary care doctor gave me antibiotics but it's not improving. What should be investigated?
I have asthma and it keeps waking me up at night. My controller inhaler doesn't seem to be working well enough. What are the next steps?
I was just diagnosed with COPD. I smoked for 20 years but quit last year. What is the most important thing I can do to slow the progression?
My spirometry showed an FEV1/FVC of 0.65. What does this mean and what does it tell my doctor about my lungs?
I have pulmonary hypertension. My cardiologist says it's related to my lungs. What is the difference between primary and secondary pulmonary hypertension?
My CT chest showed ground-glass opacities. What does this finding mean and what diagnoses does it suggest?
I've been coughing up blood — only small amounts. My doctor ordered a CT scan. When is hemoptysis a medical emergency?
I have obstructive sleep apnea and was prescribed a CPAP. I find it very uncomfortable. Is there an alternative treatment?
I was diagnosed with idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis. My pulmonologist says there is no cure. What do the available treatments actually do?
I have sarcoidosis with lymph nodes in my chest. My pulmonologist says to just watch and wait. When does sarcoidosis need treatment?
I work in a dusty environment and was told I might have occupational lung disease. What is hypersensitivity pneumonitis and is it reversible?
I have a 1.5 cm lung nodule found incidentally on CT. What follow-up is needed and how worried should I be about cancer?
My COPD has worsened and I'm now on oxygen at home. What should I know about home oxygen therapy and its proper use?
I was diagnosed with a pulmonary embolism. My doctors are debating anticoagulation versus a clot-dissolving medication. How is this decision made?
I have chronic cough that has been evaluated extensively with no clear cause. My pulmonologist mentioned upper airway cough syndrome and GERD. How are these connected to cough?
I had COVID-19 six months ago and still have shortness of breath and fatigue. Could I have long COVID lung damage?
I was diagnosed with stage 3 lung cancer and my pulmonologist is coordinating care with an oncologist. What is the role of each specialist?
I have severe asthma that doesn't respond to standard treatment. My pulmonologist mentioned biologic therapy with omalizumab. What is this and who qualifies?
I have a pleural effusion — fluid around my lung. My doctor wants to do a thoracentesis. What is this procedure and what does the fluid analysis show?
I have a COPD exacerbation and need oral steroids. My doctor also gave me antibiotics. Why are antibiotics given for a flare that might not be due to infection?
I have bronchiectasis and keep getting lung infections. How is bronchiectasis managed long term to prevent recurrent infections?
My 6-minute walk test distance was 320 meters. My pulmonologist said this is significant. What does walk test distance reflect about lung disease severity?
I have alpha-1 antitrypsin deficiency and was just diagnosed with associated emphysema. What are the treatment options specific to A1AT deficiency?
I'm a heavy smoker and my pulmonologist recommends low-dose CT lung cancer screening. Who qualifies for this screening and what does it involve?
I was told I have hypoxemic respiratory failure with a PaO2 of 55 mmHg. What does this mean and what is the treatment?
I use a long-acting bronchodilator (LABA) for COPD and my pharmacist warned me never to use it for asthma alone. Why is this important?
I have interstitial lung disease and my DLCO is very reduced. What does reduced diffusion capacity mean and how does it affect daily life?
I developed a spontaneous pneumothorax. My doctor treated it conservatively. What are the chances it will happen again and when is surgery recommended?
I need a bronchoscopy. What does this procedure involve and what can it diagnose that a CT scan can't?
I have severe COPD and my pulmonologist mentioned lung volume reduction surgery or a bronchoscopic valve. Are these realistic options?
